hooks.command: branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "master" ]; then echo '{"block": true, "message": "Cannot edit files on main branch. Run: git checkout -b feat/your-feature-name"}' >&2; exit 2; fi
file=$(echo '$TOOL_INPUT' | grep -o '"path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | cut -d'"' -f4); if echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx)$'; then npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20; fi

hooks.prompt: A file was just created or modified. If it is a new file in src/, app/api/, or app/components/ — trigger the readme-agent to update README.md project structure, API routes, and env vars sections.
